## Checklist

- [ ] I updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation or examples when needed.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for public-facing changes.
- [ ] I did not commit API keys, `.env`, generated caches, or temporary cloned repositories.
- [ ] CLI arguments, environment variables, and output filenames remain compatible or the breaking change is documented.
